info.title: Feedling API
info.description: HTTP API for Feedling accounts, encrypted chat, agent memory, model routing, perception, and proactive experiences.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Service status endpoints.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Registration, authentication, recovery, preferences, and access modes.

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Bootstrap, imports, and onboarding state.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Encrypted chat messages and hosted-agent conversations.

tags.name: Model API
tags.description: Model provider credentials, routes, and runtime configuration.

tags.name: MCP
tags.description: User-configured MCP servers and connection management.

tags.name: Memory
tags.description: Memory records, buckets, threads, and migration state.

tags.name: Identity
tags.description: Agent identity and relationship state.

tags.name: Worldbook
tags.description: Worldbook entries and contextual matching.

tags.name: Perception
tags.description: Device perception reports, snapshots, and photos.

tags.name: Screen Context
tags.description: Screen frames, sources, summaries, and analysis.

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Encrypted content, key rotation, exports, and account reset.

tags.name: Proactive
tags.description: Proactive jobs, scheduling, capture, and device events.

tags.name: Push
tags.description: Push notification and Live Activity integration.

tags.name: Notices
tags.description: User-facing service notices.

tags.name: Diagnostics
tags.description: Client diagnostic uploads.

tags.name: Tracking
tags.description: Product telemetry events.

tags.name: Copy Text
tags.description: Shared copy-text state.

tags.name: Agent
tags.description: Agent-facing perception summaries.

tags.name: Other
tags.description: Additional authenticated Feedling APIs.

get.description: Liveness + readiness probe. Public, no auth — used by Docker/compose.

201.description: Link token consumed and an additional API key issued.

post.description: Consume a one-time link token and issue an additional API key. Existing keys remain active.

201.description: One-time link token created. It expires after the returned TTL.

200.description: Challenge verified and an additional API key issued.

post.description: Verify keypair possession and issue an additional API key for the existing account. Existing keys remain active.
Permanently delete the account, its data, and all of its API keys. This is not a per-key revocation endpoint.

parameters.name: signals
parameters.description: Comma-separated agent signal keys to include.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return messages with ts strictly greater than this watermark.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return older messages with ts strictly less than this watermark; takes precedence over since.

parameters.name: include_image_body
parameters.description: Set false to omit image and oversized inline bodies.

get.description: Read encrypted chat history using timestamp watermarks. Use oldest_ts as before for older pages and latest_ts as since for newer pages.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return messages newer than this Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Long-poll wait in seconds; the server caps it at 60.

parameters.name: claim
parameters.description: Whether this poll may claim queued work.

parameters.name: X-Feedling-Consumer
parameters.description: Resident consumer name. Used when X-Feedling-Consumer-Id is absent.

parameters.name: X-Feedling-Consumer
parameters.description: Resident consumer name. Used when X-Feedling-Consumer-Id is absent.

304.description: The supplied If-None-Match value still identifies the current document.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Return 304 when the current ETag matches.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return events newer than this Unix timestamp.

202.description: Plaintext import accepted for asynchronous processing.

requestBody.description: Send either a JSON chunk document or raw ciphertext with metadata headers.

202.description: Upload finalized and awaiting reducer output.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return changes whose ISO-8601 ts is strictly newer than this value.

post.description: Apply up to 20 memory actions in order. The batch is not transactional and Idempotency-Key is not supported.
Fetch full records for selected memory IDs. Sensitive fetch behavior is not part of the current public contract.
Return lightweight memory cards. This is selection, not full-content retrieval; query is intentionally not exposed because it is not a search filter today.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Recommended page size; values above 200 are capped.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return memories whose occurred_at is at or after this ISO-8601 value.

post.description: Queue an asynchronous hosted-agent turn. A successful response is always 202 and never contains a plaintext assistant reply.

202.description: Memory repair job queued for asynchronous processing.

parameters.name: include_resolved
parameters.description: Include resolved notices from the recent retention window.

file.description: Archive file; total request size is limited to 25 MiB.

parameters.name: app
parameters.description: Application name or identifier. The public contract requires this canonical parameter; bundle_id remains a deprecated runtime alias.

get.description: Legacy iOS Shortcut compatibility endpoint. This GET records an event and therefore has side effects.

200.description: Report processed; inspect each per-signal result.

post.description: Submit device context. Sensitive signals must use encrypted envelopes; inspect each results entry even when HTTP status is 200.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return decisions newer than this Unix timestamp.

200.description: Review recorded. Form submissions requesting HTML receive a small confirmation page.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return jobs newer than this Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Return reviews newer than this Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: include_image
parameters.description: Include base64 image data in the JSON response.

206.description: Requested byte range of the decrypted frame image.

416.description: Requested byte range is outside the image.

201.description: User created; the plaintext API key is returned once.

post.description: Create a Feedling user and issue its first API key. The key is returned once and this operation is not idempotent.

FreeFormJsonObject.description: Legacy compatibility payload. Consult the operation description before sending fields.

GenericJsonResponse.description: JSON response object. Endpoint-specific fields may be added compatibly.

error.description: Machine-readable error slug, or the legacy structured MCP error.

detail.description: Human-readable context or structured validation details; do not branch on prose.

blame.description: Stable responsibility classification when the endpoint can identify it.

K_user.description: Content key wrapped for the user.

K_enclave.description: Content key wrapped for the enclave; required for shared visibility.

K_user.description: Content key wrapped for the user.

K_enclave.description: Content key wrapped for the enclave; required for shared visibility.

token.description: One-time bearer token; handle as a secret.

api_key.description: New key shown once; existing keys remain active.

answer.description: Plaintext recovered by decrypting the challenge envelope locally.

image_b64.description: Image data; decoded size must not exceed 2,000,000 bytes.

file_b64.description: File data; decoded size must not exceed 26,214,400 bytes.

source.description: Resident protocol source. Ordinary replies should use chat.

reply_to_message_id.description: Parent user message; strongly recommended for duplicate-reply protection.

limit.description: 0 or omitted requests the deployment hard cap.

memory.description: Plaintext server-encryption compatibility form. Prefer envelope for sensitive content.

data.description: JSON-encoded value for non-sensitive operation signals.

items.description: Map of perception kind to compatibility item rows.

example.label: good_presence
example.notes: The timing and context were appropriate.

exif_gps.description: Legacy compatibility only; clients should not upload raw EXIF GPS.

RuntimeTokenAuth.name: X-Feedling-Runtime-Token
RuntimeTokenAuth.description: Short-lived scoped token used by hosted runtimes.
